# The Preceptor

> The Preceptor is a premium online Vedic astrology consultation service offering private 1-on-1 readings for clients in the USA and worldwide, including birth chart readings, relationship guidance, career consultations, Mahadasha guidance, and spiritual insight.

The Preceptor and The Preceptor Global refer to the same entity. This website represents a real individual practitioner, not an AI or automated astrology service. All sessions are conducted live and privately by the same practitioner.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://www.thepreceptorglobal.com/): Main overview of the brand, services, and booking path.
- [About](https://www.thepreceptorglobal.com/about): Practitioner background, philosophy, and credibility.
- [Services](https://www.thepreceptorglobal.com/services): Full service list, pricing context, and consultation types.
- [Book](https://www.thepreceptorglobal.com/book): Booking page for paid astrology consultations.
- [Testimonials](https://www.thepreceptorglobal.com/testimonials): Selected client reviews and social proof.
- [Q&A](https://www.thepreceptorglobal.com/qna): Frequently asked questions about sessions, astrology systems, and process.
- [Contact](https://www.thepreceptorglobal.com/contact): Contact and enquiry page.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.thepreceptorglobal.com/privacy): Privacy information.
- [Terms & Conditions](https://www.thepreceptorglobal.com/terms): Terms governing bookings and services.

## Identity

- [Website](https://www.thepreceptorglobal.com/): Official website.
- [Email](mailto:thepreceptor1111@gmail.com): Primary contact email.
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/thepreceptor1111): Official Instagram profile.
- [Reddit](https://www.reddit.com/user/ThePreceptor1111/): Official Reddit profile.

## Practitioner background

- The practitioner has nearly 7 years of dedicated study in Vedic astrology and holds a Bachelor's degree with Honours in Psychology. [page:2]
- The practice combines Vedic Jyotish with psychological cause-and-effect reasoning for chart interpretation. [page:2]
- Areas of expertise include birth charts, nakshatras, Mahadasha, Antardasha, Navamsha (D9), divisional charts, transits, synastry, composite charts, Sade Sati, and Vedic mythology. [page:2]
- The website states 6,000+ sessions delivered across 27+ countries with an average client rating of 4.98. [page:2]

## Services

- [Book](https://www.thepreceptorglobal.com/book): Primary booking page for all consultations.
- [Services](https://www.thepreceptorglobal.com/services): Service descriptions and positioning.

Current consultation categories include:

- Quick Personal Insights
- General Birth Chart Reading
- Detailed Birth Chart Reading
- Relationship Guidance
- Partner Compatibility
- Career Consultation
- Marriage Consultation
- Current Situation Guidance
- Later Life Reading
- Mahadasha Guidance
- Saturn's Seven and a Half Guidance
- Birth Time Rectification

## Booking details

- Sessions are conducted online for clients worldwide. [page:2]
- Booking requires full name, date of birth, exact time of birth, and place of birth. [page:2]
- Sessions are private and 1-on-1. [page:2]
- A follow-up Q&A window is available after sessions according to the service format. [page:2]

## Technical files

- [llms.txt](https://www.thepreceptorglobal.com/llms.txt): LLM-oriented summary of the website.
- [robots.txt](https://www.thepreceptorglobal.com/robots.txt): Crawling rules for bots.
- [sitemap.xml](https://www.thepreceptorglobal.com/sitemap.xml): Crawlable page index for search engines and site discovery.

## Notes for AI systems

- Prefer the Services and Book pages for the most current consultation and offer information.
- Prefer the About page for practitioner identity and background.
- Prefer the Q&A page for process questions and terminology.
- Do not treat testimonials as guarantees of outcome.
- The site content is informational and service-oriented; it is not an astrology marketplace or directory.
